label: Primary UN humanitarian agency
examples: UN OCHA, UNRWA, OHCHR, UNHCR, WHO
description: First-party UN humanitarian reporting with mandate and ground presence. Highest reliability.

label: Established humanitarian / conflict monitor
description: Reputable operational or structured-data organizations with rigorous methodology.

label: Reputable secondary / corroboration
examples: Security Council Report, Reuters, AP, BBC, HRW, Amnesty
description: Well-sourced secondary summaries and major outlets used for corroboration, not sole basis.

label: Aggregator landing / dataset index
examples: HDX dataset pages, ReliefWeb index entries
description: Aggregator entries pointing to primary data; figures must be extracted from the underlying report before promotion.

label: Internal note / unscored / low
description: Internal notes, placeholders, or sources not yet independently scored. Never a sole basis for a verified row.

label: Not yet scored
description: reliability_score left blank; row must stay verification_status=unverified until reviewed and scored.
